mapper.select:
SELECT kt.id, kd.title, kv.version_no AS versionNo, kt.task_type AS taskType, kt.status, kt.retry_count AS retryCount, kt.max_retry_count AS maxRetryCount, kt.error_message AS errorMessage, kt.started_at AS startedAt, kt.finished_at AS finishedAt FROM knowledge_base_vector_task kt left join knowledge_document kd on kd.id = kt.document_id left join knowledge_document_version kv on kv.id = kt.version_id
kd.del_flag=0
AND kd.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
